# STARTER_CASE_STUDY_REWRITE

Use this starter for **Case Study Rewrite**.

## Load order
- `dist/DEPLOY_LITE.md`
- `dist/lite_routes/rt_case_study_rewrite.md`
- `dist/lite_contracts/case_study_rewrite.md`
- `src/runtime/cards/skills/content-and-case-study-expert.md`
- optional: `src/runtime/cards/skills/brand-strategy-expert.md`
- optional: `src/runtime/cards/skills/ux-research-expert.md`
- `dist/SESSION_ZERO.md`

## Best for
- Use when communication quality depends on narrative order and proof clarity, not just editing.

## Estimated footprint
- Approximate startup size with governing skills: ~1251 words / ~1664 tokens

## Escalate instead to
- `dist/DEPLOY_BRAND.md` when the task widens inside one domain
- `dist/DESIGNPILOT_DEPLOY.md` when multiple domains or proof-sensitive conflicts are central

## Suggested kickoff prompt
I am starting a lightweight DesignPilot session for Case Study Rewrite. Use the loaded lite bootstrap, this route, and this contract. Ask only for the missing context that would materially change routing or output quality.
